description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the rust Docker image and defines a single stage called build. Add a build job named build that runs in the build stage and executes the following shell commands in order: rustup component add rustfmt, cargo fmt --all -- --check, cargo build --verbose, cargo test --verbose, rustup component add clippy-preview, and cargo clippy. No services, caches, artifacts, or special rules are needed.
